title: R1 Gesture & HAO Optimization Map
summary: Created comprehensive machine-readable YAML mapping of all R1 ring and G2 glasses gestures with reliability notes, identified battery-saving display modes, and documented HAO 2.0 optimization settings from research dossier.

deliverables.description: Structured YAML with 8 R1 ring gestures, 6 G2 temple gestures, 4 reliability issues, battery-saving modes, display positioning, and advanced usage patterns

critical_reliability_issues: R1 disconnects and cannot reconnect without charging pod - HIGH severity
battery_saving_strategies: Silent Mode: Press & hold both temple touchpads 1s (disables all display)
Brightness: Set to 40-60% indoors (1200 nits overkill)
Display Timeout: Minimize to 10s for notifications
Health Widget: Check intermittently, not continuous live tracking
display_optimization_positions: Near: Reading text, teleprompter (easier focus on small text)
Bottom height: Sitting at desk (below eye level)
Top height: Walking/standing (higher in field of view)

notes_for_orchestrator: All gesture mappings extracted from existing research_dossier.md which already contained comprehensive YouTube review transcripts and forum intelligence
YAML structure designed for machine-readability with nested objects for easy parsing by guide generation systems
Reliability levels cross-referenced across multiple sources (official docs, Reddit, Gizmodo review)
Identified that R1 has more reliability issues (4) than G2 (0 high-severity issues)
Battery-saving modes align with HAO 2.0 display optimization strategies documented in research dossier
